behavior_summary: U8P_BASKET::look is the object's U8P_BASKET::look handler: when the player examines the basket it displays the short description text 'basket' and then suspends/ends the U8P_BASKET::look process.

U8P_BASKET::use handles player U8P_BASKET::use of the basket: it reads the item's status word via Item::getStatus(this) into a temporary, tests bit 0x0100, and uses that bit as a toggle for the basket's UI (gump). If bit 0x0100 is set it calls Item::closeGump(this); otherwise it calls Item::openGump(0x0E, this).
notable_control_flow: U8P_BASKET::look: single linear flow — show short description 'basket' then suspend/terminate the process.

U8P_BASKET::use: read status -> branch on (status & 0x0100): true -> Item::closeGump(this); false -> Item::openGump(0x0E, this). The 0x0100 bit is inferred to indicate whether the item's gump is open.
open_questions: The meaning of status bit 0x0100 is inferred to be the gump-open flag based on toggle behavior; this is likely but not explicitly documented in the script (confidence: medium).
The script uses a 'suspend' after U8P_BASKET::look; whether this yields to engine UI timing or just ends the process is implementation-specific (confidence: low).
local1 is annotated as a temporary holding the result of Item::getStatus(this); its exact width/type and other flag bits are not documented (confidence: low).
The contents or layout of gump id 0x0E opened by Item::openGump are not present in this script and are external data (confidence: high that it opens a basket UI, low about specific contents).

main_function.name: U8P_BASKET::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description when the player examines the basket (display 'basket').
entry_conditions: Triggered by the player performing a 'U8P_BASKET::look' / examine action on the basket (U8P_BASKET::look event).
Operates as a fast-area/U8P_BASKET::look-type process invoked by the engine for object inspection.

function_map.name: U8P_BASKET::use
function_map.role: toggle/open/close the basket gump when the player uses the item

function_map.name: Item::getStatus
function_map.role: read item status/flags word for this item instance

function_map.name: Item::openGump
function_map.role: open a UI/gump for the item (here gump id 0x0E)

external_calls.purpose: Read the item's status/flags word into a temporary so the script can test bit 0x0100.
Close the basket's UI when the status bit indicates the gump is currently open.
Open the basket's UI (gump id 0x0E) when the status bit indicates no gump is open.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BASKET::look is the object's U8P_BASKET::look handler: when the player examines the basket it displays the short description text 'basket' and then suspends/ends the U8P_BASKET::look process.
